title: Introduction to Python
description: A beginner-friendly introduction to Python programming. Students learn variables, loops, and functions through hands-on projects.

title: Scratch Basics
description: Introduction to programming with Scratch, a visual block-based language. Great for first-time coders.

title: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: Learn the language of the web. Students build interactive web pages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript basics.

title: Game Design with Python
description: Design and build your own video game using Python and Pygame. Covers sprites, collision detection, and game loops.

title: Robotics Introduction
description: Hands-on introduction to robotics. Students build and program robots to complete challenges using sensors and motors.

title: Web Design Fundamentals
description: Build beautiful, responsive websites from scratch. Covers HTML structure, CSS styling, and basic layout techniques.

title: Introduction to Data Science
description: Explore data through charts, statistics, and storytelling. Students use Python and real datasets to find patterns and insights.

title: Advanced Robotics
description: Advanced robotics for experienced students. Covers autonomous navigation, computer vision, and multi-sensor fusion.
